betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6RBMK Reactor Components§f

§aBuild your RBMK from specialized columns — each with a unique function in the reactor!§f

§6Essential Components§f:

§b• RBMK Fuel Channel§f — holds a single fuel rod, generates heat and neutron flux from fission. Fuel removed/placed by RBMK crane.
§b• RBMK Fuel Rod§f — 8 billets in an empty assembly, crafted shapelessly. Each type has its own flux function, heat output, and melting point.

§b• RBMK Steam Channel§f — converts water into steam using reactor heat. §e4 densities§f: Steam (100°C) → Dense (300°C) → Super Dense (450°C) → Ultra Dense (600°C). Higher density = less cooling but more turbine stages. Steamed connectors allow pipes below the reactor.

§b• RBMK Control Rod§f — smoothly varies flux from 0–100% in 25% increments. RBMK Console allows any whole number value. §eColor groups§f enable remote batch control.
§b• RBMK Automatic Control Rod§f — self-regulating based on temperature thresholds.

§b• RBMK Graphite Moderator§f — turns fast neutrons into slow neutrons.
§b• RBMK Neutron Reflector§f — reflects flux back to its source. §cDangerous§f with linear/quadratic fuels!
§b• RBMK Neutron Absorber§f — absorbs all flux, converts to heat (1°C per 20 flux).

§b• RBMK Irradiation Channel§f — stores items for neutron irradiation. Use for §bThorium Fuel§f breeding and Gold-198 production. Absorbs all passing neutrons.
§b• RBMK Fluid Heater§f — heats various liquids (not just water). Cannot use steam connectors.

§b• RBMK Cooler§f — rapidly cools 5×5 area using cold Perfluoromethyl (50 mB/t). Useful for non-power RBMKs that focus on byproducts.
§b• RBMK Storage Column§f — 12-item buffer queue for fuel rods, compatible with conveyor automation.
§b• RBMK Structural Column§f — fills empty space, transfers heat, does nothing else.
§b• RBMK Cover Panel§f — must cover every column with neutron flux to prevent radiation leakage.

§6Control Systems§f:
§b• RBMK Console§f — 17×17 display, remote control rods, AZ-5 SCRAM button, total flux display, steam compression settings.
§b• RBMK Crane Console§f — links to the reactor, deploys a crane over the RBMK for automated fuel rod handling.

§6ReaSim§f: Alternate components with 8-direction neutrons (75% strength), different steam boiling mechanics, and 5kHE/t control rod movement cost.
